---
title: "Contact Raborn Decision Sciences"
about:
    template: jolla
    image-shape: rounded
    image: assets/anthony-raborn.jpg
    links:
        - icon: bluesky
          text: Bluesky
          href: https://bsky.app/profile/raborndecisionsciences.com
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/company/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: envelope-fill
          text: Email
          href: mailto:hello@raborndecisionsciences.com 
---

Have a measurement, analytics, reporting, or R/Shiny tool problem? Send a short note below.

```{=html}
<!-- Change or deletion of the name attributes in the input tag will lead to empty values on record submission-->
<div class="rds-contact-form-wrapper">
  <form
    action="https://forms.zohopublic.com/anthonyraborndecis1/form/ContactUs/formperma/eRC7sH8Sc7qeaUyjXh69YZaPp4p2K18Q5w6VYqO-62Y/htmlRecords/submit"
    name="form"
    id="form"
    class="rds-contact-form"
    method="POST"
    accept-charset="UTF-8"
    enctype="multipart/form-data"
  >
    <input type="hidden" name="zf_referrer_name" value="">
    <input type="hidden" name="zf_redirect_url" value="">
    <input type="hidden" name="zc_gad" value="">

    <div class="rds-form-header">
      <!--<p class="rds-eyebrow">Contact</p>-->
      <!--<h2>Contact Raborn Decision Sciences</h2>-->
      <p>
        Tell me what you are trying to solve, what tools or data are involved,
        and what timeline you are working toward.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="rds-form-grid rds-name-grid">
      <div class="rds-form-field">
        <label for="Name_First">
          First name <span>*</span>
        </label>
        <input
          id="Name_First"
          type="text"
          maxlength="255"
          name="Name_First"
          fieldType="7"
          placeholder="Your"
          required
        />
      </div>

      <div class="rds-form-field">
        <label for="Name_Last">
          Last name <span>*</span>
        </label>
        <input
          id="Name_Last"
          type="text"
          maxlength="255"
          name="Name_Last"
          fieldType="7"
          placeholder="Name"
          required
        />
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="rds-form-field">
      <label for="Email">
        Email <span>*</span>
      </label>
      <input
        id="Email"
        type="email"
        maxlength="255"
        name="Email"
        value=""
        fieldType="9"
        placeholder="you@example.com"
        required
      />
    </div>

    <div class="rds-form-field">
      <label for="SingleLine">
        Organization <span>*</span>
      </label>
      <input
        id="SingleLine"
        type="text"
        name="SingleLine"
        value=""
        fieldType="1"
        maxlength="255"
        placeholder="Organization, Self, or N/A"
        required
      />
      <p class="rds-help-text">
        If not affiliated with an organization, please put “Self” or “N/A.”
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="rds-form-field">
      <label for="MultiLine">
        What are you trying to solve? <span>*</span>
      </label>
      <textarea
        id="MultiLine"
        name="MultiLine"
        maxlength="65535"
        placeholder="Briefly describe the problem, the data/tools involved, and what a successful outcome would look like."
        required
      ></textarea>
      <p class="rds-help-text">Please be as descriptive as you can.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="rds-form-grid">
      <div class="rds-form-field">
        <label for="Date">Timeline to start</label>
        <input
          id="Date"
          type="text"
          name="Date"
          maxlength="25"
          placeholder="dd-MMM-yyyy"
        />
        <p class="rds-help-text">
          When would you like to start working on your solution?
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="rds-form-field">
        <label for="Date1">Deadline for completion</label>
        <input
          id="Date1"
          type="text"
          name="Date1"
          maxlength="25"
          placeholder="dd-MMM-yyyy"
        />
        <p class="rds-help-text">
          When do you need the project completed?
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <button type="submit" class="rds-submit-button">
      Submit inquiry
    </button>
  </form>
</div>
```

Additionally, you can contact Raborn Decision Sciences on Bluesky, GitHub, LinkedIn, or via email directly, with all links provided below.
